message:
test(e2e): add D-TEST contention elimination framework (bd-3wop3.7)

Scaffolds the comprehensive test suite for verifying Phase 1 contention
fixes (D1-D5) work together. Establishes regression gates that will block
merges if performance degrades.

Test categories:

Benchmark Gates (blocked on D1):
- test_8t_throughput_regression_gate: 8t >= 1.5x C SQLite
- test_16t_throughput_regression_gate: 16t >= 1.0x C SQLite

Contention Tests:
- test_no_global_locks_in_commit_fast_path (D1)
- test_parallel_wal_segments_independent (D1)
- test_page_cache_shard_distribution (D2)
- test_combiner_reduces_atomic_ops (D3)
- test_ebr_no_gc_pauses (D5) — RUNNABLE NOW
- test_scaling_curve (D1)

Stress Tests (runnable now):
- test_64_thread_no_deadlock
- test_contention_under_gc_pressure

Infrastructure:
- C SQLite baseline measurement via rusqlite
- FrankenSQLite throughput measurement (sequential fallback until D1)
- Scaling report generator for manual benchmarking

Tests marked #[ignore] with dependency reasons until D1 (parallel WAL)
completes. The EBR and stress tests are runnable immediately.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
